ogTitle: Comet vs Commissioners Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Comet and Commissioners Flat.
heading: Comet vs Commissioners Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Comet, Queensland and Commissioners Flat, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Comet has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Commissioners Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Comet or Commissioners Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Comet has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Commissioners Flat scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Comet scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Commissioners Flat scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Comet or Commissioners Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Comet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
